title: Here's how medication abortion works with just one drug that's still fully available
description: A federal appeals court ruling restricts telemedicine access to the abortion drug mifepristone for the whole country, at least temporarily. But another drug that remains available is safe and effective at ending early pregnancy.

title: 9 tribes sue to stop exploratory drilling in Black Hills near sacred site

title: Trump Says US Navy Will Escort Ships out of Strait of Hormuz
description: President Donald Trump has announced that the United States military will help guide stranded ships out of the Strait of Hormuz.
